headline: Ecolab Holders Reject Independent Chair Proposal as Beck Touts Record Year, AI Growth
summary: Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) shareholders re-elected the company’s 13 director nominees and rejected a stockholder proposal calling for an independent board chair policy at the company’s annual meeting, where Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Christophe Beck also outlined the company’s 2025 perfo
